context.title: English Schools' FA suspends all football

children.text: Statement from the English Schools' Football Association:

Further to recent correspondence with regard to the Covid-19 virus, the ESFA continues to follow government and FA advice. Please therefore note that all schools’ football organized by the national body and its member Associations is to be

.

Schools are advised to follow the latest advice from the DfE with regard to their activities. The ESFA will continue to monitor the national advice and the guidance from The FA, and updates will be communicated via website and social media.

Thank you for your ongoing support and co-operation.

seo.description: Due to Coronavirus, English Schools' FA has cancelled all schools football matches.
